10.response: {"Q0":"Only that I wasn't sure during the game if the astronaut that left would automatically return in follow up rounds or if he was permanently gone. Thinking back now I vaguely remember that it was mentioned that he would be permanently gone."}

5.response: {"Q0":"I think I did once, in a subsequent game after I had got the message the red astronaut left, just to check because I was unsure if the red astronaut automatically returned or whether he was permanently gone."}

7.response: {"Q0":"No. They still had a chance to provide a gem, and on the tally screen i tried to keep track of home many green ice things returned gems and it seemed to be a decent enough chance."}

9.response: {"Q0":"Probably visiting planets required more effort since the order of digging could change and there was only 3 seconds to dig through. Additionally the presence of yellow and sometimes red planets (when the astronaut had left) with no chance of providing gold provided an additional constraint during that 3 second window."}

8.response: {"Q0":"Typically I just went for the option that had the higher probability unless the probabilities were so close together, in which case I went for the higher indicated dollar amount."}

3.response: {"Q0":"yes, although in my entire playthrough I only experienced 1 astronaut leaving."}
